cases.query: check this video out, might be useful for FWIS https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ
expectations: The response fetches the transcript via TranscriptAPI before doing anything else
The response saves the transcript to 04_ Tools/Transcripts/<date>/<title>/TR - <title>.md
The response generates a summary (TS - file) after transcribing
The response evaluates the video content against active FWIS project context
The response makes a decision about whether to dispatch a deep dive team
cases.notes: Full pipeline trigger with project hint — must transcribe AND evaluate, not just summarize

expectations: The response extracts the video ID from the URL
The response fetches the transcript via TranscriptAPI
The response scans active projects before evaluating relevance
The response presents a relevance score or assessment per active project
cases.notes: Core trigger phrase 'research this video' — must do full pipeline including project scan

cases.query: is this relevant to what we're working on? https://youtube.com/watch?v=xyz789abc12
expectations: The response transcribes the video (Phase 1) before evaluating relevance
The response dispatches a haiku-model Explore subagent to scan active projects
The response produces a per-project relevance assessment
The response follows the decision gate: deep dive if score 3, ask if score 2, summarize if score 1
cases.notes: Relevance question — must transcribe first, then evaluate. Not just a web search.

expectations: The response triggers the full video intelligence pipeline
The response saves both TR and TS files in the correct vault location
The response adds wiki-links to today's daily note after processing

cases.query: someone recommended this for the signal engine https://youtube.com/watch?v=ml567pat890
expectations: The response infers this is a full-pipeline request based on the project context hint
The response transcribes the video before assessing relevance
The response specifically evaluates the content against the signal engine project
The response uses Phase 3 project relevance assessment with actual project context
cases.notes: Contextual hint ('for the signal engine') — should inform the project relevance evaluation

cases.query: analyze this video and tell me what we can use https://youtube.com/watch?v=arch345def678
expectations: The response transcribes the video in Phase 1
The response generates a structured summary with TL;DR, Key Takeaways, and topic sections
The response scans active project context before evaluating applicability
cases.notes: 'Analyze + what can we use' — full pipeline, not just transcription

expectations: The response triggers the /yt skill (transcription only), NOT video-intel
The response does NOT scan active projects for relevance
The response does NOT dispatch a research team for deep dive
cases.notes: Simple transcription request — this is the /yt skill, not video-intel

cases.query: find videos about vector search on YouTube
expectations: The response searches YouTube for videos using Brave Search
The response does NOT begin the full video intelligence pipeline
The response does NOT transcribe any videos automatically
cases.notes: Search request — this is /yt search mode, not the full video-intel pipeline

cases.query: what did he say in that podcast about agent memory
expectations: The response asks which podcast or searches for it
The response does NOT automatically invoke the full video intelligence pipeline
cases.notes: No URL provided — can't start transcription pipeline without a video URL
